source_rows.source_name: Ankara İl Sağlık Müdürlüğü AI studies ethics page
source_rows.observed_claim: The page says AI related studies presented to that ethics committee will be suspended until new regulation.
source_rows.gate_use: treat as a local ethics status gate signal before any AI study route claim

source_rows.source_name: Sağlık Bilgi Sistemleri Genel Müdürlüğü AI department page
source_rows.observed_claim: The page lists ministry AI department tasks around AI improvable processes, solutions, collaborations, interoperability, and education materials.
source_rows.gate_use: keep public Track A wording aligned with education, interoperability, and assurance preparation without official role claims

source_rows.source_name: Current medical AI intelligence priority update
source_rows.observed_claim: The current intelligence pass elevated Türkiye ethics status gates as a safe next public build.
source_rows.gate_use: connect ethics status verification to the public medical AI portfolio roadmap

gate_rows.question: Which ethics committee page or portal is being referenced
gate_rows.required_evidence: committee specific page, portal notice, or official email

gate_rows.question: Is the work synthetic infrastructure, retrospective data work, prospective clinical study, or deployment
gate_rows.required_evidence: study type and committee route statement
gate_rows.public_action: keep synthetic infrastructure separate from clinical study language

gate_rows.question: Will any identifiable, deidentified, or institutional patient data be used
gate_rows.required_evidence: data use decision and approval route
gate_rows.public_action: keep no patient data boundary visible

gate_rows.question: Is anyone claiming clinical validation, clinical usefulness, or clinical deployment readiness
gate_rows.required_evidence: formal study protocol and approvals before any claim

gate_rows.question: Is any ministry, hospital, university, or ethics committee role being claimed
gate_rows.public_action: use public source and no endorsement wording

gate_rows.question: Can the next action be public infrastructure without portal submission
gate_rows.public_action: publish gate note, validator, and issue closeout only

next_safe_public_build: Add reviewer question maintainer public preview acceptance archive public handoff closure note without scoring, compatibility, endpoint, patient data, clinical validation, route access, or endorsement claims.
